mapper.update: UPDATE certificate SET certificate_status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE valid_until IS NOT NULL AND valid_until < #{today} AND certificate_status <> 'CANCELLED'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM certificate WHERE valid_until IS NOT NULL AND certificate_status <> 'CANCELLED' AND valid_until < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{warnDays} DAY) ORDER BY valid_until ASC LIMIT 200
